headline: Federal Council moves to force early French teaching on German-speaking cantons
summary: Bundesrat opens consultation (to 5 Oct 2026) on a law requiring a second national language in all primary schools.

headline: Swiss F-35 cost climbs as new engine adds 25 percent
summary: Le Temps reports the F-35 engine choice raises Swiss per-jet cost by ~25 percent.

headline: G7 summit at Evian draws protests, Geneva calls in French police
summary: French police reinforcements deploy to Geneva for G7-Evian spillover; 200-300 No-G7 militants lack lodging.

headline: Vaud cantonal government's awaited budget-balancing plan draws scrutiny
summary: The Vaud Conseil d'Etat's return-to-balance plan raises questions over cuts and timetable.

headline: Swiss CHEOPS exoplanet mission extended
summary: The Bern-led, ESA-operated CHEOPS satellite gets a mission extension to keep characterising known exoplanets.

headline: Switzerland fought to keep importing EU waste
summary: Bern lobbied to preserve Switzerland's ability to import EU waste for its under-capacity incinerators.

headline: Trump disputes leaked Iran deal terms as IRNA publishes seven points
summary: Iran's IRNA published seven points of a reported US-Iran agreement; Trump called the leaked ceasefire terms fake.

headline: Ukraine reports May territorial gains and doubled strikes on Russian logistics
summary: Ukraine claims net May territorial gains and a doubling of deep strikes on Russian logistics; ISW assesses ~280 sq km Russian losses.

headline: Pro-Russian opposition demands annulment of Armenian election result
summary: A pro-Russian opposition party calls for annulment of Armenia's election result.

headline: Ebola spreads into new areas of DR Congo
summary: Health officials warn Ebola is spreading into new areas of the DRC.

headline: Israel violence escalates amid ultra-Orthodox draft protests
summary: Violence escalates around Haredi anti-conscription protests as Israel strikes southern Lebanon.

headline: SpaceX IPO debuts, Musk reported as world's first trillionaire
summary: SpaceX listed in US markets (~11% opening pop); paper gains push Musk's net worth past $1 trillion by reports.

headline: vm2 Node.js sandbox hit by cluster of CVSS 10.0 escapes
summary: Five critical sandbox-escape CVEs in vm2 allow host RCE; patched in 3.11.4.

headline: Ubiquiti UniFi OS command injection and privilege escalation CVEs
summary: UniFi OS critical command-injection and privesc CVEs at CVSS 9.9.

headline: Aqara smart-home cloud riddled with auth and hardcoded-key flaws
summary: A cluster of CVSS 9-10 CVEs in Aqara's cloud and apps expose hardcoded keys and missing authorization.

headline: ChromaDB cross-tenant auth bypass and remote code execution
summary: ChromaDB Python/Rust CVEs allow cross-tenant data access and trust_remote_code RCE.

headline: jmespath.php attacker-controlled PHP code execution
summary: CVE-2026-54133 (9.8): jmespath.php before 2.9.1 compiles and executes attacker-controlled PHP.

headline: Nuxt route-rule middleware bypass via case-sensitivity mismatch
summary: CVE-2026-53721 (8.8): vue-router vs routeRules case mismatch bypasses Nuxt middleware; fixed 3.21.7/4.4.7.

headline: FORGE benchmark: one polluted page poisons search-augmented recommenders
summary: FORGE shows a single polluted web page can make search-augmented LLMs promote fake products.

headline: RA-RFT teaches LLMs to retrieve by reasoning analogy, not similarity
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Reinforcement Fine-Tuning trains retrievers to rank contexts by expected reasoning benefit.

headline: Adaptive token compression for time-series language models
summary: Asymmetric token compression exploits uneven spectral contributions to cut TS-LLM compute.

headline: Stable Recovery Manifold: geometry of recoverability in continual learning
summary: Recovery subspace dimensionality stays stable across tasks, reframing catastrophic forgetting as low-dimensional.

headline: Operads as a mathematical foundation for LLM question decomposition
summary: Paper proposes operads from category theory to formalize question decomposition in LLM compositional reasoning.

headline: OrchRM: self-supervised reward modeling for multi-agent orchestration
summary: Orchestration Reward Modeling builds Bradley-Terry win-lose pairs from execution artifacts to train orchestrators cheaply.
